briefs.title: BC Adds Plan NP Drug Coverage for All Medicare Beneficiaries; Insulin Pricing Rule Removed
briefs.summary: Effective March 1, 2026, BC expands its drug plans to include Plan NP for all medicare beneficiaries, removes the insulin exemption from drug price rules, and prohibits providers from charging beneficiaries for fully covered drugs (except CF nutritional supplements).
briefs.action_required: Review your billing practices to ensure no charges are passed to beneficiaries for fully covered drugs by March 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Drug Plans Regulation amendments (Plan NP, insulin pricing, provider billing) take effect
